chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-2924 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(s) For orders on office objection. For orders on M.A No.19905/16. For orders on M.A No.4408/17. For orders on M.A No.8365/18. For hearing of main case. 02-04-2019. Mr. Shabeer Hussain Memon, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl: Advocate General a/w Adeel Soomro (Asst: Executive Engineer Nara Canal). = Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that petitioner is being paid salaries currently in compliance of the order of this Court dated 08.09.2017. However, the salary of two years from 2014 to 2015 has not been paid to him. Mr. Adeel Soomro, Assistant Executive Engineer Nara Canal Water Board Mirpurkhas is present and submits that if petitioner makes a representation in writing before the department in regard to his such grievance, the same will be decided within a period of three months. Learned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied and seeks disposal of the petition. Accordingly, this petition in terms as stated above is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE *Fahad Memon*
